title: The Mystical Theology: Darkness Beyond Light
description: The most influential text on apophatic theology: God is known by unknowing, reached by leaving behind all concepts.
introduction: The most influential text on apophatic theology: God is known by unknowing, reached by leaving behind all concepts.

translation.text: Into this darkness beyond light, we pray to come. Through not seeing and not knowing, to see and to know that which is beyond sight and knowledge.
